info.description:
FruitFly API documentation.

## Authentication
All API endpoints require authentication using API keys.

### API Key Types
- **Public Keys** (`pk_...`): Read-only access
- **Private Keys** (`sk_...`): Full read/write access

### How to Authenticate
1. Log in to your account and create an API key
2. Click the "Authorize" button in Swagger UI
3. Enter your API key: `Bearer <your_api_key>`

All requests must include the `Authorization` header.

### Multi-tenant Access
API keys are scoped to your membership in a specific account.
To access multiple accounts, create separate API keys for each.
info.title: FruitFly API

get.description: Returns all errors for the authenticated user's account

post.description: Reports an error. If fingerprint matches existing error, adds occurrence. Otherwise creates new issue and error.

get.description: Searches errors by stacktrace fields (module, function, file)
Returns a specific error by ID with paginated occurrences

patch.description: Updates an error's status or muted flag

post.description: Creates multiple telemetry spans in a single request. Used by FruitflyReporter to efficiently send batched telemetry data.

errors.description: List of errors for failed project batches (only present if some batches failed)

get.description: Returns all issues for the authenticated user's account

post.description: Creates a new issue in a project

get.description: Returns a specific issue by ID
Returns all projects for the authenticated user's account

post.description: Creates a new project in the authenticated user's account

get.description: Returns a specific project by ID
